candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; equals Net sales in shown years and is a valid top-line label.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Direct top-line sales/revenue line; more specific operating revenue label than Total Revenue.
Ancillary operating revenue, not the main top-line.

candidates.why: Mixed other operating item, not top-line revenue.

candidates.row_label: Other operating revenue and operating expenses - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not a revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected main revenue line as priority list: Net sales first, then Total Revenue as fallback if label changes by year.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line.
Equivalent COGS/cost of revenues label; likely alternate taxonomy line.

variables.notes: Preferred the more standard direct-production cost label over the duplicate synonym.

candidates.why: Could be SG&A-related overhead if populated, but it appears empty here and is less specific than other available overhead rows.
Explicit SG&A label, but it appears unpopulated in the preview while separate overhead components are populated.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the clearly populated SG&A component rows 'Administration expenses' and 'Sales expenses' visible in the full preview. Following the SG&A rule, because explicit 'Selling, General & Administration Expenses' exists but appears mostly empty, included it plus the closest populated overhead buckets for coverage across years. Excluded R&D and totals. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Administration expenses, [Income Statement] Sales expenses

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line.
Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.
Potential R&D label but appears empty and less specific than the explicit expense line.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet/intangible development cost detail, not the preferred reported P&L R&D expense.
Amortization balance sheet detail, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: Used the explicit income statement R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line and most preferred.
Acceptable fallback if direct interest expense line is unavailable in some years.

variables.notes: Priority list for reported interest expense label changes over time.

candidates.why: Usable equity line, but includes non-controlling interests so it is not preferred when parent-only equity exists.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Chose outside candidate list because BE should exclude non-controlling interests to avoid double counting with MIB, and the full preview contains the better parent-only equity line 'Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent'. Candidate 'Total equity' includes NCI. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

candidates.why: Transaction gain/loss line, not balance sheet minority interest.
Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred versus balance sheet NCI.
Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; valid fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as priority list; avoids using income statement attribution rows.
